home.title: Huzuza abarimu bahuje n'abakoresha abakozi mu buryo bwizewe.
home.subtitle: Shakisha abarimu bahamijwe, koresha imiterere y'ibikorwa, kandi urinde amakuru y'itumanaho kugeza igihe umuyobozi abyemeje.

steps.1: Abarimu barandikisha kandi bakora imyirondoro yuzuye.
steps.2: Abakoresha abakozi barandikisha kugirango babone amakuru y'abarimu.
steps.3: Umuyobozi yemeza uburenganzira bwo kubona amakuru y'itumanaho.

adminOversight.title: Igenzura ry'umuyobozi
adminOversight.description: Umuyobozi umwe agenga ibyemezo by'abakoresha abakozi, uburenganzira bwo kubona amakuru, ubutumwa, n'igenzura ry'ibiri mu rubuga.

weeklyStatus.title: Imiterere y'umwarimu buri cyumweru
weeklyStatus.description: Abarimu bahindura imiterere y'ibikorwa buri cyumweru kugirango abakoresha abakozi babasange.

protectedContact.title: Amakuru y'itumanaho arinzwe
protectedContact.description: Amakuru y'itumanaho ahishwa kugeza igihe umuyobozi yemeje icyifuzo cy'ukoresha abakozi.

messages.title: Ubutumwa
messages.heading: Ikigo cy'Itumanaho
messages.subject: Inyito
messages.messageTabDescription: Hinduranya hagati y'agasanduku kawe n'ubutumwa wohereje.

login.title: Injira
login.heading: Injira muri konte yawe ya HomeTutors
login.subtitle: Injira kugirango ugenge abarimu, abakoresha abakozi, n'ubutumwa.

signup.title: Iyandikishe
signup.heading: Kora konte yawe y'ukoresha abakozi cyangwa umwarimu.
signup.subtitle: Iyandikishe mu buryo bwizewe kandi ujye muri dashboard ya HomeTutors.
signup.name: Izina

tutorDetail.requestSuccess: Icyifuzo cyawe cyo kubona itumanaho cyoherejwe ku muyobozi.
tutorDetail.requestFailure: Ntibishoboka kohereza icyifuzo cyo kubona itumanaho.

tutorList.title: Shakisha Abarimu
tutorList.heading: Shaka Abarimu Bahuje
tutorList.subtitle: Shakisha kandi uhitamo abarimu bahamijwe mu murongo wacu.
tutorList.empty: Nta barimu bashakishwa. Gerageza guhindura ibyifuzo.

admin.title: Ikibaho cy'Umuyobozi
admin.heading: Incamake y'Urubuga
admin.notLoggedIn: Injira nk'umuyobozi kugirango ubashe kwinjira muri iki kibaho.
admin.dashboardError: Ntibishoboka gutangira ikibaho cy'umuyobozi. Reba uburenganzira bwawe.
admin.approveRecruitersDesc: Reba kandi emera konti nshya z'abakoresha abakozi
admin.moderationDesc: Siba ubutumwa cyangwa imyirondoro itari myiza
admin.paymentTrackingDesc: Genga kwishyura kw'abakoresha abakozi n'imishahara y'abarimu
admin.userManagementDesc: Reba abakoresha bose kandi ubashe guhindura uburenganzira
